summary: Tested delivery driver registration changes for Syrian local requirements. Backend API tests passed: fuel-types endpoint returns petrol/electric, documents endpoint validates bike_photo, fuel_type, and GPS coordinates. Frontend pages verified: JoinAsDeliveryPage shows correct requirements without driving license, DeliveryDocuments form has bike_photo and fuel_type fields.
critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryDocuments schema correctly uses bike_photo and fuel_type instead of vehicle_type and motorcycle_license
auth.py /api/delivery/documents endpoint validates: empty bike_photo (400), invalid fuel_type (400), empty home_latitude/longitude (400/422)
/api/delivery/fuel-types returns exactly 2 options: petrol and electric
JoinAsDeliveryPage requirements list correctly shows: age 18+, Syrian ID, motorcycle (petrol/electric), smartphone, area knowledge - NO driving license
JoinAsDeliveryPage FAQ correctly states 'لا، لا نطلب رخصة قيادة' (No, we don't require driving license)
DeliveryPages.js DeliveryDocuments component has bike_photo field with 'صورة الدراجة' label
DeliveryPages.js has fuel_type selector with petrol/electric options
DeliveryPages.js has personal photo visibility note
DriverRequestCard.js and DeliveryTab.js correctly reference bike_photo instead of vehicle_photo
seed_data_creation: Created test delivery driver user for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery driver registration has been updated for Syrian local requirements: bike_photo replaces vehicle_photo, fuel_type (petrol/electric) replaces vehicle_type, driving license removed, GPS location mandatory. All backend validations working correctly.

backend_fuel_types_endpoint.details: GET /api/delivery/fuel-types returns 200 with petrol and electric options

backend_documents_rejects_empty_bike_pho.details: POST /api/delivery/documents returns 400 with 'صورة الدراجة مطلوبة' for empty bike_photo

backend_documents_rejects_invalid_fuel_t.details: POST /api/delivery/documents returns 400 with 'نوع الوقود مطلوب' for invalid fuel_type

backend_documents_accepts_valid_submissi.details: POST /api/delivery/documents returns 200 with valid bike_photo, fuel_type, and GPS coordinates

frontend_join_delivery_page_requirements.details: Requirements section shows motorcycle (petrol/electric), NO driving license mentioned

frontend_join_delivery_page_faq.details: FAQ correctly states 'لا، لا نطلب رخصة قيادة' (No driving license required)

frontend_registration_delivery_option.details: Registration page shows delivery driver option, city field hidden for delivery type
